message:
fix: split events and resources into tabs in drilldown views (#3660)

ClusterDrillDown: Replace stacked Recent Events section and collapsible
Resource Tree with an "Events" / "Resource Tree" tab bar, so users can
switch between them without scrolling past one to reach the other.

NamespaceDrillDown: Replace the single "View All Events" button and
stacked layout with three tabs — Issues, Events, and Resources. The new
Resources tab provides a filterable list of pods, deployments, services,
and PVCs in the namespace, fixing the issue where "View all in
<namespace>" only showed events.

Closes #3646
Closes #3647

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
